test.name: Uuden Paivakirjamerkinnan Lisays

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\nice.pavliuk\\Sakarin harjoitukset\\Projekti\\outputs\\teht4\\browser\\traces\\temp\\574c523b-4696-4ec4-a419-ceea78bc9b48"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/src/html/login.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'testi' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:5173/src/html/paivakirja.html

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=#entryForm at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text '7.5' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) hyva by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element id=mood.
